name: mcp-server-atlan
description: The Atlan MCP server allows you to interact with Atlan services through multiple tools.

rating.reason: Good overall documentation with some inconsistencies. Most tools have clear, descriptive names and comprehensive descriptions with excellent examples. Parameter documentation is generally adequate with clear types and purposes. However, the input schemas lack detailed parameter descriptions - most parameters only have basic titles without explanations of their purpose, constraints, or expected formats. The search_assets_tool stands out with exceptional documentation quality, while tools like get_assets_by_dsl_tool and some creation tools could benefit from more structured parameter descriptions in their schemas.
